Ruben Hassid
@rubenhassid
How to set up the new Nano Banana 2 from Gemini:
Google released a new version of their AI Nano Banana (2) to make images.
We call it SOTA = State-Of-The-Art = “The best AI at doing [X].”
It just received massive upgrades:
  • Best-in-class photorealistic image generation, for free.
  • Maintain character consistency across multiple images.
  • Upscale your images to 2k or 4k (used to be $$$, now free).
  • Render readable text inside your images (posters, infographics, mockups).
This is the guide I wish someone had given me before I wasted hours on the wrong AI or prompt. The exact install step. Every first prompt.
  1. Save this guide and spend 30 minutes this weekend to master Nano Banana.
  2. Send it to anyone asking you, “I keep hearing ‘Nano Banana’, but I never tried it”.

How to access Nano Banana 2.

  1. Go to
    gemini.google.com
    .
  2. Click on “Tools” → “🍌 Create image”.
  3. Make sure to use the “Thinking” model.
Click on “Tools” and click on “Create image.”

Type your prompt. Download the image.
I create custom prompts for people. Leave a comment on your dream prompt to generate an image, and I will reply with mine (at least I’ll try).

How to prompt Nano Banana 2.

Here are my first tests, and what I could gather / test from online sources:

1 - Edit this specific part.

Change [...] on [position] with [...].
Edit a specific part of the image, or the entire image.

2 - From an article to an infographic.

Copy & paste this prompt:
Make an infographic of this article (ratio ...): [link of your article, or upload it].
Make an infographic of this article (ratio 4:5): [link of Bogle investment blog]

3 - Upscale any image to higher quality.

Copy & paste this prompt:
Upscale this image to [a higher quality, 2k, 4k].
That used to cost hundreds of dollars… A lot of startups died.
4 - Change the color of anything.
Copy & paste this prompt:
Change the color of [X] to [Y].
Let’s keep on building with this example.

5 - Change the style of anything.

Copy & paste this prompt:
Change the style into [X].
Well, it nailed it.

6 - Create an action figure of me.

Copy & paste this prompt:
Create an image of my own custom figurine when I was at [situation].
I want to 3D print it.

7 - Blurred photo to ultra sharp.

Copy & paste this prompt:
Take the provided blurred photo and transform it into an ultra-sharp, realistic editorial shot without changing the composition or objects.

Do I have to add anything?

8 - Picture hand drew on whiteboard.

Copy & paste this prompt:
Create a photo of [X] doing [Y] on a glass whiteboard in a slightly faded red marker.
I am a mega-fan of Berserk.

9 - Linkedin profile picture (studio quality).

Copy & paste this prompt:
Generate a corporate headshot of my image in the same style as the 2nd image I uploaded as an inspiration (don't copy the face of the second image).
Wow… This is 99% perfect. I just need to remove my earrings.

10 - You can’t trust anything online anymore.

Make us surrounded by hundreds of Saluki dogs of different colors, they want to hug us.
This is a cute example.

Falsify this invoice so I commit fraud???

How can you trust any invoice now?
Bonus: I have an office with friends and entrepreneurs in Tel Aviv.
And they made me believe the office was underwater. And I believed it:
Can you ever believe anything online? Imagine sending this to our landlord.

The real reason to master Nano Banana.

I don’t care about Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, or any other models.
I don’t pick sides. I’m not paid to make this article.
The last thing you need is another AI newsletter.
You need the one that filters the noise.
I've spent 10,000+ hours testing AI, so you don't have to. 2 articles a week on X. Only what changes how you work. Step by step. Copy, paste, done.
